context: After running migrate_v1_to_v2.py and fix_duplicate_jobs.py, remove all legacy code referencing sync_events and sync_attempts tables from the application codebase.

starting_objective.goal: Auditer puis migrer complètement la base SQLite des tables legacy vers les nouvelles tables normalisées, puis nettoyer tout le code legacy de l'application.
constraints: Ne modifier aucun fichier pendant la vérification initiale
Faire la migration manuellement (pas via l'application)
Garder un log ultra détaillé dans .sisyphus/log
Supprimer tout code legacy après migration
Ne pas laisser l'application gérer la migration
starting_objective.scope: backend/app/storage/db.py, backend/app/storage/sync_store.py, backend/app/services/sync_engine.py, backend/app/api/routes_sync.py, backend/app/api/routes_measurements.py, backend/tests/test_sync.py

changes: Simplified init_db(): removed SYNC_SCHEMA, ATTEMPT_SCHEMA executescripts, removed all 3 migration function calls
Removed import hashlib (only used by payload_hash)
Removed payload_hash() — static helper for save_event dedup
Simplified event_exists(): removed UNION with sync_events, only queries sync_candidates
Changed last_sync_time(): now queries sync_jobs.started_at instead of sync_events.created_at
Fixed type error: return cur.lastrowid → return cur.lastrowid or 0 (int | None vs int)
Removed attempt_id variable (was set from start_attempt)
Removed finish_attempt() call in success path (line 169)
Removed finish_attempt() call in exception handler (line 201)
Removed 3 calls to _save_candidate_event() — the legacy event-persist path
Note: _save_new_candidate() now exclusively handles persistence (sync_candidates + sync_decisions)
Removed _table_exists() helper (no longer needed — all tables are current)
Rewrote sync_stats() endpoint: removed all sync_attempts aggregation (attempt totals, summary_json accumulation, last_sync), removed sync_events daily breakdown
sync_stats() now only queries sync_jobs (aggregated counts, last_sync_at) and sync_candidates (daily breakdown by decision)
Removed cumulative stats (were computed from sync_attempts.summary_json)

⚠ API BREAKING: /api/sync/stats response changed shape — old: {total_attempts, successful_attempts, failed_attempts, cumulative, latest_summary, daily_breakdown, optional sync_jobs + candidates_daily_breakdown} → new: {total_jobs, successful_jobs, failed_jobs, total_candidates, total_synced, total_skipped, total_conflicts, total_invalid, total_failed, last_sync, candidates_daily_breakdown}. Frontend consuming old format will break.
Changed event.get('error_message') → cand.get('error_message') — same field name

Rewrote test_idempotency_event_blocks_only_confirmed_results: uses save_candidate() instead of save_event(), uses separate keys for failed vs synced scenarios to account for INSERT OR IGNORE semantics

verification.legacy_references_remaining: none — grep for sync_events, sync_attempts, start_attempt, finish_attempt, save_event, get_event_by_key, payload_hash returns 0 matches
